Tail Method for intData

Source: R/intData_class.r
tail.Rd

Returns the last n rows of an intData object.

Usage

# S4 method for class 'intData'
tail(x, n = min(nrow(x), 6L))

Arguments

x

An intData object.

n

The number of rows to return.

Value

A subset of the intData object.

On this page
